---
title: "Data Harmonization & Wrangling"
---

{{< include topics/harmonize-data.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/wrangle-scope.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/data-explore.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/wrangle-qc.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-conditionals.qmd >}}

{{< include activities/write-conditional.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-split-columns.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-joins.qmd >}}

{{< include activities/write-join.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-shape.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-loops.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-custom-functions.qmd >}}

{{< include activities/write-function.qmd >}}
